more.description: Johannesburg, 30 June 2026 | Jacaranda FM is pleased to announce the appointment of Bhekiwe Khumalo as the station’s new Human Resources Manager, effective 1 July 2026. more.title: Cyril Ramaphosa Meets Anti-Illegal Immigration Leaders Ahead Of Nationwide Protests
more.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa held an urgent meeting with leaders of the anti-illegal immigration movement on Monday, ahead of demonstrations planned across South Africa on 30 June. During the meeting, he urged organisers to ensure that all protests remain peaceful and lawful.
